headlines.title: Rising Waters Swamp Lake Naivasha
headlines.summary: Relentless rains are threatening a lake in Kenya’s Great Rift Valley that has become a key hub in the global flower trade.

headlines.title: NASA Awards Solutions for Federal Enterprise Procurement Contracts
headlines.summary: NASA will begin processing the awards of multiple contracts for the Solutions for Enterprise‑wide Procurement (SEWP) VI Government-wide Acquisition Contract. The contract provides streamlined access to commercial product
